headline: 2 Reasons to Like JCI and 1 to Stay Skeptical
summary: Johnson Controls has had an impressive run over the past six months as its shares have beaten the S&P 500 by 20.3%. The stock now trades at $149.89, marking a 31.3% gain. This was partly due to its solid quarterly results, and the performance may have investors wondering how to approach the situation.

headline: Johnson Controls International plc (JCI): 7 Best Electrical Contracting Stocks to Buy for Data Hall Fit-outs
summary: With a short percentage of shares outstanding of 1.49%, Johnson Controls International plc (NYSE:JCI) is among the 7 Best Electrical Contracting Stocks to Buy for Data Hall Fit-outs. On May 13, Johnson Controls International plc (NYSE:JCI) completed its acquisition of Alloy Enterprises, a Boston-based developer of next-generation thermal management technologies for high-performance data centers and other mission-critical industrial applications. […]

headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Johnson Controls International (JCI) After Strong One Year Share Gains?
summary: If you are wondering whether Johnson Controls International at around US$146.96 is offering fair value or a stretched price, the next few sections will walk through what the current data actually says about the stock. The share price sits at US$146.96, with recent returns of 6.3% over 7 days, 1.8% over 30 days, 20.2% year to date and 45.6% over 1 year, while the 3 year and 5 year returns are 144.0% and 143.3% respectively. These moves sit against a backdrop of ongoing attention on Johnson...
